query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `processing_jobs` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `uploadId` int NOT NULL,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('queued','processing','completed','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'queued',
  `progress` int DEFAULT 0,
  `inputImageUrl` text,
  `resultUrls` json,
  `errorMessage` text,
  `animeStyle` enum('shonen','seinen','shoujo','mecha','default') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'default',
  `processingStartedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `processingCompletedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `processing_jobs_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `processing_jobs_uploadId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`uploadId`) REFERENCES `manga_uploads`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `processing_jobs_projectId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`projectId`) REFERENCES `projects`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `processing_jobs_userId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
)

  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `processing_jobs_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `processing_jobs_uploadId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`uploadId`) REFERENCES `manga_uploads`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `processing_jobs_projectId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`projectId`) REFERENCES `projects`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `processing_jobs_userId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
